title: Just Perfect
description: You know what's just perfect? A modpack focused solely on performance optimization mods to enhance FPS—no quality of life or bug-fix mods.
body:
### _Finally, a Modpack That Only Contains Performance Optimizations_ 
*(Client-side only)* 

This modpack focuses purely on performance improvements without changing visuals or gameplay. Overlays, particles, and other features remain unmodified. The only PvP advantage is slightly reduced input latency from improved frame rates.

**Compatibility:** 
- This modpack is designed for client-side optimization. Server compatibility has not been tested and is out of scope for now.
- It’s guaranteed to work in singleplayer and should work on servers, but no promises.

**Development Notes:** 
- Optimization mods vary in effectiveness across versions due to fixes, patches, or mod updates. Some mods might not work in newer versions, while others may become redundant.
- Development might pause at times, but I always try to ensure updates are made when possible. 

<details>
<summary>Alternative to Sodium (VulkanMod)</summary>

- Consider [VulkanMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod) for potential performance boosts. Though I don't recommend it with this modpack. 
- Note: Some Sodium add-ons (e.g., Nvidium) are not compatible with Vulkan. Test and see what works best for your setup. 
- Future versions may explore Vulkan-specific builds, but for now, stability is the priority. 

</details>

<details>
<summary>Mod List</summary>

All mods included in this modpack for version 1.21.4:

- [Clumps](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps)
- [Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Outdated Mods</summary>

These mods are currently not updated to the latest Minecraft version as of writing. We value their contribution and look forward to their return in future updates.

- [~~Nvidium~~](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium)
- [~~More Culling Extra~~](https://modrinth.com/mod/morecullingextra)
- [~~Better Beds~~](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-beds)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Redundant Mods</summary>

Redundant Mods (Optional):
- [~~Async Pack Scan~~](https://modrinth.com/mod/async-pack-scan)
- [~~FPS Reducer~~](https://modrinth.com/mod/fps-reducer)
- [~~Dynamic FPS~~](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)

Redundant Mods (Outdated):
- [~~LazyDFU~~](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Deprecated Mods</summary>

- [~~Hydrogen~~](https://modrinth.com/mod/hydrogen) > [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [~~Entity Collision FPS Fix~~](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-collision-fps-fix) > [Collision Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/collision-fix)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Outdated Alternative Mods</summary>

- [~~Canvas Renderer~~](https://modrinth.com/mod/canvas)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Alternative Modpack</summary>

[Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)

</details>
